audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. UpgradeToFulu is only called via UpgradeState (L384) which checks time.CanUpgradeToFulu(slot). This returns true only when slot%SLOTS_PER_EPOCH==0 (via IsEpochStart at time/slots/slottime.go:139), enforced before every fork upgrade in ProcessSlotsCore (L291) after slot increment (L286).
